---
name: Bug report
about: Report a bug to help us improve Falling Sand
title: '[BUG] '
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description

A clear and concise description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. Go to '...'
2. Click on '...'
3. Scroll down to '...'
4. See error

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened instead.

## Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots to help explain your problem.

## Environment

- OS: [e.g., Windows 10, macOS 13, Ubuntu 22.04]
- Python Version: [e.g., 3.11]
- GPU: [e.g., NVIDIA RTX 3080, AMD Radeon RX 6800]
- Falling Sand Version: [e.g., v7.0]

## Additional Context

Add any other context about the problem here.

## Save File (if applicable)

If the bug occurs with a specific save file, please attach the .fsnd file.
